Petroleum Corporation (" Occidental ") issued a press release announcing that it had amended certain terms and conditions of the cash tender offers (together with the related consent solicitations in respect of certain series of Subject Notes (as defined below), the " Tender Offers ") to purchase its outstanding 4.10% Senior Notes due 2021, 2.600%
Earnings Announcement (Reported EPS: -1.76 vs Est: -1.7, Surprise: -3.67%)
Cedric Burgher transitioning from executive role at OCCIDENTAL PETROLEUM CORP /DE/.
On August 8, 2019, Occidental Petroleum Corporation (the "Company") completed its acquisition of Anadarko (the "Merger").

Events On February 3, 2010, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing preliminary proved reserves totaling 3.23 billion barrels of oil equivalent compared to 2.98 billion barrels of oil equivalent at the end of 2008.

Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing preliminary proved reserve additions from all sources for a production replacement ratio of 210 percent, before the effect of price-related revisions.

Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) issued a press release announcing the signing of a definitive purchase and sale agreement with Plains Exploration & Production Company (NYSE:PXP) to purchase all of PXPs interests in the Permian and Piceance Basins.

Information                                                   On January 29, 2008, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing preliminary proved reserve additions from all sources resulting in a production replacement rate of 116 percent.
December 17, 2007, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing acquisitions in the Permian Basin in West Texas and New Mexico and the Piceance Basin in Colorado.

November 26, 2007, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing that it had signed agreements with the Libyan National Oil Corporation to upgrade several of its existing petroleum contracts in Libya.

Disclosure On May 11, 2007, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing (i) its sale of 6,990,070 shares of the common stock of Lyondell Chemical Company in a private transaction that settled on Wednesday, May 9, 2007, as well as (ii) its intention to dispose of its remaining interest in the common stock of Lyondell Chemical

Other Events On February 5, 2007, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release announcing preliminary proved reserve additions from all sources at a production replacement rate of 245 percent.
May 19, 2005, Occidental Petroleum Corporation issued a press release describing the acquisition of an interest in oil and gas production in the Permian Basin of West Texas.
The full text of the press release is attached to this report as Exhibit 99.1.
